items_flat.summary_en: Anthropic introduced Sonnet 5 as its most agentic Sonnet yet, with stronger planning, browser and terminal tool use, and more autonomous long-running work.
items_flat.summary_zh: Anthropic 推出 Sonnet 5，定位為迄今最具代理能力的 Sonnet，強化規劃、瀏覽器與終端工具使用，以及長時間自主工作。

items_flat.title_en: Nano Banana 2 Lite and Gemini Omni Flash reach the Gemini API
items_flat.title_zh: Nano Banana 2 Lite 與 Gemini Omni Flash 登上 Gemini API
items_flat.summary_en: Google expanded Gemini's generative-media stack with a faster image model and an Omni Flash preview aimed at cost-efficient multimodal and video workflows.
items_flat.summary_zh: Google 擴充 Gemini 生成媒體產品線，推出更快速的圖片模型與 Omni Flash 預覽，主打高性價比多模態與影片工作流程。

anthropic.summary_en: Anthropic introduced Sonnet 5 as its most agentic Sonnet yet, with stronger planning, browser and terminal tool use, and more autonomous long-running work.
anthropic.summary_zh: Anthropic 推出 Sonnet 5，定位為迄今最具代理能力的 Sonnet，強化規劃、瀏覽器與終端工具使用，以及長時間自主工作。

google.title_en: Nano Banana 2 Lite and Gemini Omni Flash reach the Gemini API
google.title_zh: Nano Banana 2 Lite 與 Gemini Omni Flash 登上 Gemini API
google.summary_en: Google expanded Gemini's generative-media stack with a faster image model and an Omni Flash preview aimed at cost-efficient multimodal and video workflows.
google.summary_zh: Google 擴充 Gemini 生成媒體產品線，推出更快速的圖片模型與 Omni Flash 預覽，主打高性價比多模態與影片工作流程。

brief_en: Anthropic launches Claude Sonnet 5 | Nano Banana 2 Lite and Gemini Omni Flash reach the Gemini API
brief_zh: Anthropic 推出 Claude Sonnet 5｜Nano Banana 2 Lite 與 Gemini Omni Flash 登上 Gemini API
